_comment: Modul-Banner (16:9) fuer die Lernpfad-Karten der Startseite + /learn/n5-Hub. Bewusst FROEHLICH und BUNT (User-Direktive 2026-06-16) — NICHT der gedaempfte Washi/Sepia-Ink-Stil der Lektionsbilder. Einheitlicher Illustrationsstil ueber alle 14 Module, nur Motiv + Leitfarbe wechseln, damit das Set zusammenwirkt. Text-/personenfrei.
style: A cheerful, modern flat vector illustration, banner composition. Bright, joyful, saturated but harmonious color palette with soft smooth gradients and gentle soft shadows. Clean rounded shapes, airy and friendly mood, a little kawaii but tasteful and contemporary. Cute centered subject with a few small decorative accents (sparkles, dots, leaves). The background MUST fill the entire frame edge to edge with a soft cheerful pastel color gradient — never plain white, no empty white margins or borders. High quality, crisp, professional editorial illustration. IMPORTANT: do NOT use muted, sepia, beige, brown, washi-paper, ink-wash or vintage tones — the palette must be fresh, bright and happy.

modules.motif: an open blank notebook with a cute calligraphy brush resting on it and a soft swirl of pink ink, surrounded by floating cherry-blossom petals; dominant cheerful rose-pink and coral palette
playful angular folded-paper shapes and clean bold brush strokes arranged like a fan, with small geometric confetti; dominant bright sky-blue and cyan palette
a cute ink brush in a round brush holder beside a small ink stone and a sprig of bamboo, fresh and tidy; dominant bright teal and green palette
a friendly round alarm clock with a completely blank face (no numerals), tear-off calendar pages and a little hourglass; dominant sunny amber-yellow and orange palette
two steaming cute teacups beside a folded paper fan and a small cherry-blossom branch, warm and welcoming; dominant cheerful peach and coral palette
a tidy row of colorful origami paper cranes descending in size like a family, with little hearts floating above; dominant happy lavender, mint and multicolor palette
an inviting spread of cute Japanese food: an onigiri rice ball with a nori strip, a steaming ramen bowl and two pieces of sushi; dominant bright tomato-red, cream and fresh-green palette
a cheerful shinkansen bullet train speeding past a snow-capped Mount Fuji with a little suitcase and a folded map; dominant bright blue, white and green palette
three empty rounded speech bubbles linking into one another like puzzle pieces, with small sparkles; dominant cheerful violet and pink palette
a cute artist's paint palette with vivid color blobs, a paintbrush and a small rainbow arc and color swatches; dominant vibrant rainbow multicolor palette
a pair of bright running shoes and a little bicycle with dynamic motion lines conveying everyday action and energy; dominant energetic orange and lime-green palette
a smiling sun peeking from a fluffy cloud with a rainbow, a cute umbrella and a small four-season tree; dominant bright azure-blue and fresh multicolor palette
a cute red heart with a stethoscope curving around it, a crisp apple and a water droplet, healthy and fresh; dominant fresh mint-green with a bright red accent
a cozy cute little Japanese house with a turquoise tiled roof, sliding shoji doors and a round paper lantern, with a small potted plant; dominant cheerful turquoise and coral palette
